task.name: Create shared EmptyState component
task.action:
Create `src/components/shared/EmptyState.tsx` with the following:
1. Define `EmptyStateAction` interface with optional `href` (string) and optional `onClick` (() => void), plus required `label` (string). 2. Define `EmptyStateProps` interface with `icon` (LucideIcon), `title` (string), `description` (string), optional `action` (EmptyStateAction), and `variant` ('page' | 'widget' | 'table'). 3. Implement the component as a named export `EmptyState`. 4. Use a variant config object (not if/else chains) to map variant names to Tailwind class sets. Reference the exact design tokens from the spec's Visual Design Tokens section. 5. Render structure: container div > icon > title (p tag) > description (p tag) > optional CTA. 6. CTA rendering logic: - If `action.href` is provided: render `` with link styling for widget variant. - If `action.onClick` is provided: render `` for page variant. For page variant, apply responsive sizing: `h-9 md:h-10 px-4 md:px-6 text-sm md:text-base`. - If no `action`: render nothing. 7. All icons get `aria-hidden="true"`. 8. Import `Link` from `next/link`, `Button` from `@/components/ui/button`, and `LucideIcon` type from `lucide-react`.
task.verify: Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build` to confirm the new file compiles without errors.

task.name: Refactor Accounts page empty state
task.action: In `src/app/accounts/page.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `Wallet` from `lucide-react`. 2. Replace the inline empty state block (the div with `Icons.wallet`, "No accounts, yet." text, and the two desktop/mobile Button elements) with: ``` { ... } }} variant="page" /> ``` 3. For the onClick handler: use the existing pattern that checks `window.innerWidth >= 768` to open Sheet vs Drawer. Look at the existing `handleEdit` function for the pattern. Create a similar handler or inline the logic. 4. Remove the now-unused `Icons.wallet` import if no other references remain in this file.
task.verify: Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`. Visually confirm the empty state renders correctly by checking the component structure.

task.name: Refactor Budgets page empty state
task.action:
In `src/app/budgets/page.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `PiggyBank` from `lucide-react`. 2. Replace the inline empty state block with: ```
``` 3. Wire the onClick to the existing create budget Sheet/Drawer open logic (same pattern as Accounts). 4. Clean up unused icon imports.
task.verify: Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

task.name: Refactor Income page empty state
task.action:
In `src/app/income/page.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `HandCoins` from `lucide-react`. 2. Replace the inline empty state block with: ```

task.name: Refactor Card Group detail page empty state
task.action:
In `src/app/cards/groups/[groupName]/page.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `CreditCard` from `lucide-react`. 2. Replace the inline empty state block with: ```
``` 3. Note: This uses `action.href` instead of `action.onClick` because it navigates back to the cards list. The EmptyState component renders this as a Link-styled Button for the page variant. Implementation detail: For the page variant with `href`, render a `{label}` to get Button styling with Link navigation. 4. Clean up unused icon imports.
task.verify: Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

task.name: Refactor AccountsSummary empty states
task.action:
In `src/components/dashboard/AccountsSummary.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `Wallet`, `CreditCard` from `lucide-react`. 2. Remove the local `EmptyState` component definition (lines ~136-158) and `EmptyStateProps` interface. 3. Where the old `` was used, replace with: ```
``` 4. Where the old `` was used, replace with: ```
``` 5. Remove the now-unused `Wallet` and `CreditCard` imports from `lucide-react` if the only usage was in the old local EmptyState. Check if they are used elsewhere in the file first. 6. Update tests in `AccountsSummary.test.tsx`: - The title text "No accounts yet" and "No credit cards yet" are UNCHANGED, so those assertions remain. - Update any assertions on description text (e.g., "Add your first account to start tracking" becomes "Add an account to start tracking"). - Add assertions for the new link CTAs if desired (check for "Go to Accounts" / "Go to Cards" text).
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/dashboard/AccountsSummary.test.tsx` to confirm tests pass. Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

task.name: Refactor RecentTransactions empty state
task.action:
In `src/components/dashboard/RecentTransactions.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `ArrowLeftRight` from `lucide-react`. 2. Replace the inline empty state block (the div with "No transactions yet" text) with: ```
``` 3. IMPORTANT: Preserve the outer wrapper that includes the `
Recent Transactions` heading. Only replace the inner content div. 4. Update tests in `RecentTransactions.test.tsx`: - Title "No transactions yet" is UNCHANGED. - Update description assertion from "Start tracking your finances by creating your first transaction" to "Record a transaction to see activity".
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/dashboard/RecentTransactions.test.tsx` to confirm tests pass. Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

task.name: Refactor BudgetStatus empty state
task.action:
In `src/components/shared/BudgetStatus.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `PiggyBank` from `lucide-react`. 2. Remove the local `EmptyState` component definition (lines ~106-113). 3. Where the old `` was used, replace with: ```
``` 4. Update tests in `BudgetStatus.test.tsx`: - Change "No budget activity this month" assertion to "No budget activity". - Update description assertion from "Start tracking by adding budgets and expenses" to "Create a budget to track spending".
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/shared/BudgetStatus.test.tsx` to confirm tests pass. Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

Asset Categories` heading. 4. Update tests in `AssetCategoriesChart.test.tsx`: - Title "No asset categories" is UNCHANGED. - Update description assertion from "Add accounts to see your asset distribution" to "Add accounts to see distribution".
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/dashboard/AssetCategoriesChart.test.tsx` to confirm tests pass. Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

Monthly Summary` heading.

phase.name: Phase 4 - Table and List Empty States

task.name: Refactor ExpenseTable empty state
task.action:
In `src/components/tables/expenses/ExpenseTable.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `SearchX` from `lucide-react`. 2. Replace the inline empty state inside the `` (lines ~694-700) with: ```
``` 3. Keep the wrapping `` and `` -- only replace the inner content. 4. The TableCell currently has `className="h-32 text-center"`. The EmptyState component provides its own `h-32` and centering, so remove `h-32 text-center` from the TableCell to avoid doubling. Keep `colSpan`. 5. Update tests in `ExpenseTable.test.tsx`: - Change "No expense transactions found." to "No expenses found".
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/tables/expenses/ExpenseTable.test.tsx` to confirm tests pass. Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

``` 3. Same TableCell cleanup as ExpenseTable (remove `h-32 text-center` from TableCell). 4. Update tests in `IncomeTable.test.tsx`: - Change "No income transactions found." to "No income found".
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/tables/income/IncomeTable.test.tsx` to confirm tests pass. Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

task.name: Refactor Transfers mobile empty state
task.action:
In `src/app/transfers/page.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `SearchX` from `lucide-react`. 2. Replace the inline empty state block (lines ~143-145, the div with "No results found for your search.") with: ```
``` 3. Note: This is in a mobile card list context, not inside a table. The `table` variant works here because the visual treatment is the same (compact, minimal).
Also check `src/components/transactions/TransactionsMobileView.tsx` for a similar empty state. If it has "No results found for your search.", refactor it the same way. Update `TransactionsMobileView.test.tsx` accordingly: - Change "No results found for your search." to "No results found".
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/transactions/TransactionsMobileView.test.tsx` to confirm tests pass (if applicable). Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

task.name: Refactor ExpenseBreakdownChart empty state
task.action:
In `src/components/shared/ExpenseBreakdownChart.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState` and `PieChart` from `lucide-react`. 2. Replace the inline text "No expenses recorded for this month." with: ```
``` 3. Preserve the outer wrapper with the header/month picker above the empty state. 4. Update tests in `ExpenseBreakdownChart.test.tsx`: - Change "No expenses recorded for this month." to "No expenses this month".
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/shared/ExpenseBreakdownChart.test.tsx` to confirm tests pass. Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.

task.name: Refactor CategoryBreakdownChart empty state
task.action:
In `src/components/shared/CategoryBreakdownChart.tsx`: 1. Import `EmptyState` from `@/components/shared/EmptyState`, `PieChart` and `HandCoins` from `lucide-react`. 2. Update the `TYPE_CONFIG` object: - Change `expense.emptyMessage` to `'No expenses this month'` and add `expense.emptyDescription: 'Expenses will appear here once recorded.'` and `expense.emptyIcon: PieChart`. - Change `income.emptyMessage` to `'No income this month'` and add `income.emptyDescription: 'Income will appear here once recorded.'` and `income.emptyIcon: HandCoins`. - OR: Remove the emptyMessage fields entirely and inline the EmptyState props per type. 3. Replace the inline empty state with: ```
``` 4. The cleaner approach: remove `emptyMessage` from TYPE_CONFIG and determine icon/title/description inline based on the `type` prop.
task.verify: Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.
